headline.text: L3 Truffle Line equipment piece found without bolts for *second time* — foreign material hazard remains open.

summary: One active hold (L1 S4 packaging material), one recurring foreign-material risk at L3 Truffle Line, and a pest control flag at L2 drinking fountain. L1 S3 checkweighers allowed out-of-spec product to pass until bins were cleared; operator coaching completed.

holds.title: S4 packaging material on hold — defective wrap roll
holds.summary: 24.15 lbs of wrap placed on hold due to defect: roll improperly wound, causing machine issues.

food_safety.title: Truffle Line equipment piece missing bolts — recurring FM risk
food_safety.summary: Equipment piece found without bolts again this morning; same issue flagged previously, indicating potential for loose hardware to enter product.
food_safety.status: Open — maintenance notified, root cause for recurrence not yet identified.

quality.title: S3 checkweighers allowed out-of-spec product to pass
quality.summary: MM3 and MM4 reject bins were full; overweight and underweight products passed through until operator cleared bins and was coached.
quality.status: Resolved — bins cleared during CIL pause, operator coaching completed.

quality.title: ML3 operator error caused delayed start — caramel pistons off
quality.summary: Operator turned off caramel pistons during chocolate purge but forgot to re-enable them at startup; cooler filled with chocolate-only trays, delaying caramel deposition.
quality.status: Resolved — line running; RCA scheduled per Alan Todd.

quality.title: Truffle Line boxes contaminated with pieces of another product
quality.summary: Incoming boxes used on Truffle Line contain stuck pieces from another product; damaged and contaminated boxes being separated.
quality.status: Open — contaminated boxes being separated as found.

sanitation.title: Dead bugs accumulating around drinking fountain daily
sanitation.summary: Recurring dead bug accumulation near drinking fountain; logged in pest control log, cart re-sanitized and towels replaced daily.
sanitation.status: Open — logged for pest control; interim sanitization and towel changes in place.

sanitation.title: Truffle Line Sweco leaking during QA walkthrough
sanitation.summary: QA identified Sweco leaking out the sides during walkthrough; operators corrected and cleaned up.
sanitation.status: Resolved — operators fixed leak and cleaned area.

sanitation.title: S3 corn syrup hose leak replaced and ATP-passed
sanitation.summary: Flexible corn syrup transfer hose was leaking; replaced with heavy-duty hose, cleaned, sanitized, and ATP-verified before return to service.
sanitation.status: Resolved — ATP passed, hose in service.

opportunities.text: Review checkweigher reject-bin monitoring protocol on S3 — based on today's MM3/MM4 event where full bins allowed out-of-spec product to pass.
Review ML3 startup checklist to include caramel-piston verification after purge operations — based on today's operator error that delayed caramel deposition.
Consider adding torque-check or fastener-inspection step to Truffle Line startup checklist — based on today's recurring missing-bolts finding, second occurrence this week.
